title: polystichum ohmurae var. ohmurae
intro: Polystichum ohmurae var. ohmurae, also known as Ohmura's fern, is a variety of the Polystichum ohmurae plant, a species of fern native to Japan. It is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Polystichum ohmurae var. ohmurae include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in Japanese medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
